issues.issue: defs in 'with' clause of public package section is not used.
Communication_Properties in 'with' clause of public package section is a predeclared property set and is not needed.
left and right sides of binary expression '=' are of type 'int' and '<error>', but must be of the same type
left side of binary expression '/' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'real'
right side of binary expression '/' is of type '<error>' but must be of type 'real'
It is recommended that guarantee statements be named. (Hint: an identifier may be placed between the "guarantee" keyword and the quoted description.)
right side of binary expression '/' is not constant. Non-linear expressions are allowed only with z3. Even with z3 they are not recomended...
